articles.title: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 03 Nisan 2026
articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 03 Nisan 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 03 Nisan 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: If Your Kids Suddenly Want To Play Star Fox, Here's How
articles.title_tr: If Your Kids Suddenly Want To Play Star Fox, Here's How
articles.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy movie is primed for a predictably massive opening weekend despite mixed reviews, but the biggest surprise may be the non-Mario characters who make an appearance. Just ahead of the film's opening Nintendo revealed that Fox McCloud appears alongside all the Mushroom Kingdom denizens. If all that fancy flying puts you or your kids in the mood to explore the Star Fox oeuvre, we're here to help.Star Fox is a traditional on-rails space shooter starring a team of anthropomorphic starfighter pilots. The team itself is called Star Fox, and Fox McCloud is the team leader. The other pilots--in most games, Peppy, Falco, and Slippy--are your wingmen. The series debuted on the Super NES in 1993, showing off rudimentary but at-the-time mind-blowing 3D effects. So should you track down the original Star Fox and get shooting? Not necessarily.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Will Get A Premium Art Book This Fall
articles.title_tr: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Will Get A Premium Art Book This Fall
articles.summary: The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Hardcover)                                                                                            $57 (was $60) | Releases November 24                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Preorder at Amazon                                                                                                                                                                           Preorder at Udon                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Collector's Edition (Hardcover)                                                                                            $100 | Releases November 2026                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Udon                                                                    Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 was one of 2025's biggest hits, a gorgeous turn-based RPG that came out of nowhere and became an instant classic on launch day. One striking feature of the game is its art direction, and if you want to explore how Sandfall Interactive combined classic art influences with modern inspiration, you can do so with this new art book. Ahead of its November 24 release, The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is on sale for $57 (was $60) on Amazon, and publisher Udon Entertainment is also offering an exclusive Collector's Edition for $100.                                                                                                        The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Hardcover)                                                                $57 (was $60) | Releases November 24                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a 352-page hardcover tome packed with artwork and testimonials from developer Sandfall Interactive detailing the making of the game. The cover features fan-favorite character Maelle, while inside, readers will find notes on the creative process, artistic influences, design documents, and previously unseen illustrations used to create Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, along with insights from the people who worked on the game. This edition is available to preorder at Amazon and publish Udon Entertainment's online store.                                                        Preorder at Amazon                                                                                                                            See at Udon's Online Store                                                                          The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Collector's Edition (Hardcover)$100 | Releases November 2026The Art of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Collector's Edition is a deluxe edition that is exclusive to Udon Entertainment's online store. This version is loaded with extra content and premium packaging. It features gold ink printing, a cardboard slipcase modeled after Alicia's mask, a golden-plated metal medal, 10 art prints on textured paper, and a cardboard portfolio with exclusive artwork.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: New microwave frying technique could make french fries much healthier
articles.title_tr: New microwave frying technique could make french fries much healthier
articles.summary: Scientists have discovered a way to make French fries less greasy without ruining their taste. By combining regular frying with microwave heating, they reduce the amount of oil absorbed during cooking. The key lies in pressure inside the food—microwaves help push oil out instead of letting it seep in. The result: faster cooking, lower fat, and fries that can still stay crispy.

articles.title: After Peak's Success, Its Devs Face Burnout and Big Decisions
articles.title_tr: After Peak's Success, Its Devs Face Burnout and Big Decisions
articles.summary: Change often leaves indie developers balancing their own creative plans with what players expect after a hit. Success, especially sudden success, can reshape a studio's future overnight.Players now expect ongoing updates, long-term support, and clear roadmaps. But even at the highest level, that model is difficult to sustain. Recent layoffs at Epic Games, the company behind Fortnite, highlighted how demanding live support has become. The tension between long-term vision and player demand is becoming harder to manage. Indie teams face similar pressure without the same resources.Aggro Crab, the studio behind Peak, is one such team. However, the studio's legacy didn't start with a live-service title; instead it began with a comedic-yet-brutal soul like: Another Crab's Treasure. The title was a commercial and critical success, elevating the studio to new heights. But after finishing Another Crab's Treasure back in 2024, Aggro Crab's small team was exhausted. The three-year project left everyone drained.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: The Best Nintendo Switch & Switch 2 Deals This Week - April 2, 2026
articles.title_tr: The Best Nintendo Switch & Switch 2 Deals This Week - April 2, 2026
articles.summary: Several popular Switch 2 games are available for cheap right now, making this a wonderful time to start building out your library. This includes RPG hits like Octopath Traveler 0, casual farming games like Story of Seasons: Grand Bazaar, and the sci-fi horror of Cronos. Console deals this week are a bit harder to come by. Woot was running a flash sale offering the Switch 2 for just $400, but it sold out quickly. That means your best bet is still a full-priced unit from your typical retailers. However, there are a few fun accessories on sale, so if you're looking for some new gear, there's still a chance to cash in on great price cuts this week.Ready to get shopping? Here are the best Switch and Switch 2 deals available right now, covering everything from video games and accessories to consoles and more. Preorders are also open for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Steelbook on 4K Blu-ray, which is priced at $38. Give it a look if you want to add it to your collection as soon as possible--and don't want to worry about this unique steelbook selling out.Nintendo Switch Game DealsThere are a bunch of excellent Switch 2 game deals this week. Assassin's Creed Shadows is still cheap at $38.75 (was $60). You'll also find Octopath Traveler 0 at its lowest price ever ($40, was $50), which our review gave an 8/10 for its deep customization options and a nice balance between relaxed town-building and intense combat. If you're glad it's finally spring, check out Story of Seasons: Grand Bazaar to run your own farm and explore small-town living. It's only seeing a slight discount to $40 (was $50), but this is the best price we've seen for it on Switch 2.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Yalova’da “İdeal Kilonu Öğren, Sağlıklı Yaşa” Kampanyasıyla 1380 Kilo Verildi
articles.title_tr: Yalova’da “İdeal Kilonu Öğren, Sağlıklı Yaşa” Kampanyasıyla 1380 Kilo Verildi
articles.summary: Yalova İl Sağlık Müdürlüğü, Sağlıklı Hayat Merkezleri ve İlçe Sağlık Müdürlüklerinde yürütülen kampanya kapsamında 39 bin 882 kişinin kilo ölçümlerini gerçekleştirdi; yaklaşık 135 vatandaş ideal kilosuna ulaştı.

articles.title: Yalovaspor Gelişim Liglerinden Beraberlikle Ayrıldı
articles.title_tr: Yalovaspor Gelişim Liglerinden Beraberlikle Ayrıldı
articles.summary: Türkiye Futbol Federasyonu(TFF) tarafından düzenlenen U16 ve U17 Gelişim Ligleri’nin 14. Grubunda mücadele eden Yalovaspor’un her iki takımı da 25. Haftayı beraberlikle noktaladı.

articles.title: Satrançta, Marmara Bölge Maçları’na Ev Sahipliği Yapıyoruz
articles.title_tr: Satrançta, Marmara Bölge Maçları’na Ev Sahipliği Yapıyoruz
articles.summary: Okul Sporları Satranç Marmara Bölge Grup Turnuva müsabakalarına Yalova ev sahipliği yapıyor. 1-5 Nisan 2026 tarihleri arasında ki müsabakalarda 312 sporcu 6 kategoride hamlelerini Türkiye finalleri için gerçekleştiriyor.
